subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-04-17
subcodes.first_line: The tests of God have encircled the world of humanity from all directions. From one direction the horrors of war have laid waste millions of homes
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for peace and unity, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @spiritual transformation, @justice and wrath of God
